spec_match.rationale: Excellent implementation of a responsive, wrapping menu bar utilizing focusgroup='wrap' for top-level items.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive demo incorporating nested menu dropdown frames, Escape closing handlers, and a live terminal keystroke logger.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly illustrates the Tab-flood contrast with visual side-by-side diagrams.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly manages outer/inner context shifts and escape click targets.

references.rationale: The see also section now includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5637601087193088 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms cleanly to the flat-borders look with custom dark log output terminal boxes.

summary: The menu-bar concept is an excellent, highly polished component demonstrating wrap boundaries and menu popups and now satisfies the required ChromeStatus reference invariant.
